title.en: Luminous Pulse of the Midnight Zone

description.ko: 투명한 생명체들이 스스로 빛을 내며 어두운 심해에서 춤을 추는 평화로운 심해 풍경입니다.
description.en: A peaceful deep-ocean scene where translucent life forms dance in the dark abyss, lit by their own internal light.

prompt: A highly detailed, cinematic 8k render of 'The Abyssal Neural Network' in the AQUA-5 zone. A collective of giant, translucent jellyfish with #40E0D0 turquoise and #48D1CC teal bioluminescent membranes drift through the dark #000080 midnight zone. Their long, glowing tendrils pulse with liquid light as they navigate through fluid #006994 ocean currents and marine snow. Volumetric lighting captures the serene, high-pressure atmosphere of the deep sea. Ray-traced reflections.
